daily.text: Open the daily cockpit and review the queued original.
Ship one original by hand: universal by default, artifact twice a week.
Ship three substantive manual replies: two relationship rooms, one universal room.
Answer people who replied to the account while the exchange is live.
Tell the active agent “shipped” with the URLs so the scorecard updates.

weekly.text: 15 substantive replies; stretch toward 25 only if specificity holds.
5 original X posts: 3 universal observations and 2 artifacts/demos.
Record every root-author response separately from likes.
Run the 20-minute review: rooms, best reply, best original, profile visits, follows.
Paste settled numbers and one decision into performance.md.

profile.text: Bio says what the account makes and covers in one legible promise.
Pinned post is an accessible start-here artifact or mission compression.
Substack link resolves to the intended start page.
Avatar remains recognizable at 32px; header shows one visual system.
First six originals demonstrate universal range and at least two artifacts.

activeExperiment.hypothesis: Mid-size relationship rooms will earn a higher root-author response rate than universal amplifier rooms while amplifiers may produce more reply views.
activeExperiment.control: 10 substantive replies in mid-size relationship rooms
activeExperiment.treatment: 10 substantive replies in universal amplifier rooms
activeExperiment.secondaryMetric: median reply views and visible profile-visit movement
activeExperiment.reviewGate: Review after 20 total logged replies; change no other major targeting variable during the block.

hooks.name: Plain deflation
hooks.structure: translate the inflated claim into one flat, concrete sentence.

note: Hooks are structures only. Rewrite in voice.md and for the actual post. No template is ready to paste.
